reference: My stomach has been feeling queasy for the past three days. It was until last night that I started getting severe pains in my stomach, and I felt dizzy. I also felt like throwing up. This morning, my symptoms are worse. I keep burping, and my stomach keeps making noises as if I am hungry, but I am not. Due to my severe stomach pain, I have back pain, and my ribs also hurt.
